title: TRIBAL MEMBER SERVICES - 211info
text: COW CREEK BAND OF UMPQUA TRIBE OF INDIANS TRIBAL MEMBER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF General office for intake and information for services and programs. 2371 NE Stephens Street Suite 100 Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Federally recognized tribal members or children of tribal members Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 672-9405 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 672-9405 Toll-free (800) 929-8229 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Douglas County Services: Native American General Assistance Specialized Information and Referral * Native American Community Tribal Council Offices If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COW CREEK BAND OF UMPQUA TRIBE OF INDIANS
